name: Tesla, Inc.
description: Tesla, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, sells, and leases fully electric vehicles, energy generation and storage systems, and offers services related to its products.

name: Apple Inc.
description: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories worldwide.

name: Microsoft Corporation
description: Microsoft Corporation develops, licenses, and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide.

name: Amazon.com, Inc.
description: Amazon.com, Inc. engages in the retail sale of consumer products and subscriptions in North America and internationally.

name: Alphabet Inc.
description: Alphabet Inc. offers various products and platforms in the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific, Canada, and Latin America.

name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
description: Meta Platforms, Inc. focuses on building products that enable people to connect and share through mobile devices, personal computers, virtual reality headsets, and wearables worldwide.

name: Netflix, Inc.
description: Netflix, Inc. provides entertainment services with paid memberships in approximately 190 countries.

name: NVIDIA Corporation
description: NVIDIA Corporation focuses on personal computer graphics, graphics processing units, and also on artificial intelligence solutions.
